# Unit-Ingest Test Fixtures

Generated by `scripts/generate-test-fixtures.mjs`. **Committed to git** so
vitest + the daily test suite (`/api/tests/run`) can use them as known
inputs.

## File map

### Vitest baseline (do not rename — tests load by exact filename)

| File | Format | What it tests |
|------|--------|---------------|
| `manulife-test-fake-Awarded-Units.xlsx` | xlsx | `manulife-awarded-units-xlsx` parser (Mode A). 5 rows of `TEST UNIT N — DELETE ME` with property "Test Tract". |
| `manulife-test-fake-Data-sheet.pdf` | PDF | `manulife-data-sheet-pdf` parser (Mode B). Same 5 rows, tabular PDF. |
| `PlantationExam_UnitNoPlots_TESTID0001.pdf` | PDF | `wy-plantation-exam-unit` parser. Filename-only extraction. |

### Office walkthrough batches (ALPHA, BRAVO, …)

Each batch produces one xlsx + one Manulife PDF + one Weyerhaeuser PDF.
Unit names are uniquely tagged `TEST-MNL-<batch>-<n>` so when rows show
up in Pending Units, the office can trace each row back to exactly one
fixture file. Mix and match batches when validating a parser change —
e.g. drop ALPHA into a Manulife contract and BRAVO into a different
Manulife contract; both should land 5 rows each, in their respective
contracts.

| Batch | Files | Property | County | Work type | Spacing |
|-------|-------|----------|--------|-----------|---------|
| **ALPHA** | `Ramos Awarded Units TEST ALPHA.xlsx`, `Data sheet. TEST ALPHA manulife awarded.pdf`, `PlantationExam_UnitNoPlots_99001.pdf` | Alpha Tract | Alphaville | Crop Maintenance | 9x9 |
| **BRAVO** | `Ramos Awarded Units TEST BRAVO.xlsx`, `Data sheet. TEST BRAVO manulife awarded.pdf`, `PlantationExam_UnitNoPlots_99002.pdf` | Bravo Tract | Bravoville | Hand Piling | 10x10 |

Generated this run: 15 file(s).

## Why fake data over real samples

The real Drive samples (gitignored under `docs/samples/unit-ingest/`) have
proprietary data and aren't safe to commit. These fixtures use obviously-
fake values ("Testland", year 2099, prices ≤ 125, county "Alphaville" /
"Bravoville") so any row showing up in a real dashboard is instantly
recognizable as test debris.

## Office walkthrough

1. Drop one of the batch files into a contract's `Maps & Specs/` folder
   in Drive (or use a dedicated `__TEST <Landowner>` contract created
   via `scripts/ingest/setup-test-contracts.mjs`).
2. Hit "Run ingest now" on the Ingest Audit page (admin), or wait for
   the 7 AM PT cron.
3. **Pending Units** populates with 5 rows tagged `TEST-MNL-<batch>-N`.
4. Approve / reject; verify they appear in the contract's Units tab.
5. Cleanup with `node scripts/ingest/reset-test-data.mjs --commit`
   followed by `--purge-units-prefix "TEST-MNL"` if you approved any.

## Regenerating

```bash
pnpm install                                    # pdf-lib if missing
node scripts/generate-test-fixtures.mjs         # all batches
node scripts/generate-test-fixtures.mjs --set ALPHA   # one batch
```

Idempotent — overwrites existing fixtures. Commit the diff if you've
intentionally changed the test data.

## Vitest cases that use the baseline fixtures

See `__tests__/unit-ingest.test.ts` — every parser test loads from
`lib/tests/fixtures/unit-ingest/`.
